Aegidron.name: Indestructible Fortress
Aegidron.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (60~80)% less damage from explosive attacks , and are immune to Stun . (Does not stack)

Amione.name: Magical Twin Powers
Amione.desc: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Anubis.name: Guardian of the Desert
Anubis.desc: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ground. Sometimes dodges attacks with a high speed sidestep in battle.

Arsox.name: Warm Body
Arsox.desc: Keeps the rider warm in cold environments.

Astegon.name: Black Ankylosaur
Astegon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage dealt to ores, and you can obtain more Ore while mounted.

Azurmane.name: Plasma Dash
Azurmane.desc: Can be ridden. Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.

Azurobe.name: Waterwing Dance
Azurobe.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Water while mounted.

Azurobe Cryst.name: Icewing Dance
Azurobe Cryst.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. Changes the player's attack type to Ice while mounted.

Bakemi.name: Grinning Death
Bakemi.desc: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by (40~80)% . (Does not stack)

Bastigor.name: Blizzard Crash
Bastigor.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with an Ice-forged hammer.

Beakon.name: Thunderous
Beakon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

Beakon Cryst.name: Coldsnap
Beakon Cryst.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)% . This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Ice Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst )

Beegarde.name: Worker Bee
Beegarde.desc: Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch. While in team, Elizabee's stats will be increased.

Bellanoir.name: Nightmare Iris
Bellanoir.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Nightmare Ray.

Bellanoir Libero.name: Nightmare Stare
Bellanoir Libero.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful [[Nightmare Bloom.

Blazamut.name: Magma Kaiser
Blazamut.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

Blazamut Ryu.name: Dragon Kaiser
Blazamut Ryu.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

Blazehowl.name: Hellflame Lion
Blazehowl.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

Blazehowl Noct.name: Darkflame Lion
Blazehowl Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

Blue Slime.name: Slime Body
Blue Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Braloha.name: Balmy Weather
Braloha.desc: Can be ridden. While at a base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to Breeding Farm to produce eggs. (Effect does not stack.)

Bristla.name: Princess Gaze
Bristla.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals.

Broncherry.name: Overaffectionate
Broncherry.desc: Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Broncherry Aqua.name: Overaffectionate
Broncherry Aqua.desc: Can be ridden. While in team, Broncherry Aqua helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Bulldosu.name: Yokozuna's Presence
Bulldosu.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify . (Does not stack)

Bushi.name: Brandish Blade
Bushi.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

Bushi Noct.name: Flash Blade
Bushi Noct.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Iaigiri.

Caprity.name: Berry Picker
Caprity.desc: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch.

Caprity Noct.name: Venom Picker
Caprity Noct.desc: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch.

Carnibora.name: Entangling Tongue
Carnibora.desc: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches ( Grass / Power: (40~80) ). (Does not stack)

Cattiva.name: Cat Helper
Cattiva.desc: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Cave Bat.name: Bat Backup
Cave Bat.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Cawgnito.name: Telepeck
Cawgnito.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Phantom Peck.

Celaray.name: Zephyr Glider
Celaray.desc: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

Celaray Lux.name: Jolt Glider
Celaray Lux.desc: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Increases speed while gliding for an extended time.

Celesdir.name: Blessing of Purification
Celesdir.desc: Can be ridden. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.

Celesdir Noct.name: Blessing of Chaos
Celesdir Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for (40~80)% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

Chikipi.name: Egg Layer
Chikipi.desc: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

Chillet.name: Wriggling Weasel
Chillet.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dragon while mounted.

Chillet Ignis.name: Sparkling Weasel
Chillet Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

Cinnamoth.name: Mysterious Scales
Cinnamoth.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Poison Fog.

Clovee.name: Happy Clover
Clovee.desc: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Cremis.name: Fluffy Wool
Cremis.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Croajiro.name: Leap Stance
Croajiro.desc: When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

Croajiro Noct.name: Shadow Stance
Croajiro Noct.desc: When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in team, increases Attack of Dark pals.

Cryolinx.name: Dragon Hunter
Cryolinx.desc: While fighting together, Dragon Pals drop more items when defeated.

Cryolinx Terra.name: Electro Hunter
Cryolinx Terra.desc: While fighting together, Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

Daedream.name: Dream Chaser
Daedream.desc: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with magic bullets.

Dandilord.name: Mist Stalwart
Dandilord.desc: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison (2~6) . While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison , and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

Dazemu.name: Sand Sprint
Dazemu.desc: Can be ridden. Runs faster over sand.

Dazzi.name: Lady of Lightning
Dazzi.desc: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with lightning bolts.

Dazzi Noct.name: Lady of Dark Lightning
Dazzi Noct.desc: While in team, appears near the player. Follows up player attacks with dark lightning bolts.

Demon Eye.name: Demonic Sight
Demon Eye.desc: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Depresso.name: Caffeine Inoculation
Depresso.desc: When activated, Depresso drinks a massive amount of energy drinks, causing its movement speed to increase for a limited time.

Digtoise.name: Drill Crusher
Digtoise.desc: When activated, performs Shell Spin, follows the player while spinning and mines ores efficiently.

Dinossom.name: Fragrant Dragon
Dinossom.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

Dinossom Lux.name: Thunder Dragon
Dinossom Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Electric attacks while mounted.

Direhowl.name: Direhowl Rider
Direhowl.desc: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts

Dogen.name: Homeward Prayer
Dogen.desc: When activated, moves to the closest base. Cannot be used within dungeons, etc.

Dualith.name: Forest Laser
Dualith.desc: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

Dualith Noct.name: Corruption Laser
Dualith Noct.desc: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

Dumud.name: Soil Improver
Dumud.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

Dumud Gild.name: Golden Harvest
Dumud Gild.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Ground Pals. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin.

Dupin.name: Trick-Loving Fluffle
Dupin.desc: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player ( Fire / Power: (100~200) / Burn buildup: 777 ). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by (30~50)% . (Does not stack)

Dynamoff.name: Electro-Massage Incubation
Dynamoff.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by (20~40)% . (Does not stack)

Eidrolon.name: Liberated Pterosaur
Eidrolon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% for each other Dragon or Dark Pal in your party.

Eidrolon Ignis.name: Resentful Pterosaur
Eidrolon Ignis.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis )

Eikthyrdeer.name: Guardian of the Forest
Eikthyrdeer.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

Eikthyrdeer Terra.name: Guardian of the Golden Forest
Eikthyrdeer Terra.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. Increases efficiency of cutting trees.

Elgrove.name: Mother Nature's Menace
Elgrove.desc: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (30~50)% .

Elgrove Cryst.name: Father Winter's Threat
Elgrove Cryst.desc: While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

Elizabee.name: Queen Bee Command
Elizabee.desc: When fighting together, stats will increase the more Beegarde are in your team.

Elphidran.name: Amicable Holy Dragon
Elphidran.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. While fighting together, Dark Pals drop more items when defeated.

Elphidran Aqua.name: Amicable Water Dragon
Elphidran Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

Enchanted Sword.name: Enchant
Enchanted Sword.desc: While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

Eye of Cthulhu.name: Mad Eye Lunge
Eye of Cthulhu.desc: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

Faleris.name: Scorching Predator
Faleris.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Ice Pals drop more items when defeated.

Faleris Aqua.name: Tidal Predator
Faleris Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

Felbat.name: Life Steal
Felbat.desc: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.

Fenglope.name: Wind and Clouds
Fenglope.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

Fenglope Lux.name: Stormcloud
Fenglope Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

Finsider.name: Echo Chamber
Finsider.desc: While in team, Finsider helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory.

Finsider Ignis.name: Ember Chamber
Finsider Ignis.desc: While in team, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of weapons in the player's inventory. Also increases Attack of Fire Pals.

Flambelle.name: Magma Tears
Flambelle.desc: Sometimes produces Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Flaracle.name: Burning Future
Flaracle.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn , the enemy explodes , dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

Flopie.name: Helper Bunny
Flopie.desc: While in team, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Foxcicle.name: Aurora Guide
Foxcicle.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Ice Pals.

Foxparks.name: Huggy Fire
Foxparks.desc: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

Foxparks Cryst.name: Huggy Frost
Foxparks Cryst.desc: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

Frostallion.name: Ice Steed
Frostallion.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Ice and enhances Ice attacks while mounted.

Frostallion Noct.name: Steed of Darkness
Frostallion Noct.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Dark and enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

Frostplume.name: Peacock Poune
Frostplume.desc: While fighting together, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens your focus, improving reload speed.

Fuack.name: Surfing Slam
Fuack.desc: When activated, Fuack body surfs toward an enemy and slams into them.

Fuack Ignis.name: Fire Tackle
Fuack Ignis.desc: When Activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards and enemy and slams into them.

Fuddler.name: Ore Detector
Fuddler.desc: When activated, generates subtle vibrations to detect nearby ore.

Galeclaw.name: Galeclaw Rider
Galeclaw.desc: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

Ghangler.name: Master Night Angler
Ghangler.desc: Can be ridden to travel quickly across water. While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

Ghangler Ignis.name: Flame Lantern
Ghangler Ignis.desc: Can be ridden to travel quickly across water. While fighting together, the time it takes for Pals to bite during night fishing is reduced.

Gildane.name: Sandstorm's Blessing
Gildane.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Ground while mounted.

Gildra.name: Resurrection
Gildra.desc: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.

Gloopie.name: Sticky Princess
Gloopie.desc: While fighting together, the capture gauge decreases more slowly in the fishing minigame when the bar is not aligned.

Gloopie Primo.name: Cephalo-Princess
Gloopie Primo.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Gobfin.name: Angry Shark
Gobfin.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Aqua Gun. While in team, increases player's Attack.

Gobfin Ignis.name: Angry Shark
Gobfin Ignis.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Spirit Fire. While in team, increases player's Attack.

Gorirat.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
Gorirat.desc: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack for a limited time.

Gorirat Terra.name: Full-power Gorilla Mode
Gorirat Terra.desc: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat Terra's Attack for a limited time.

Green Slime.name: Slime Body
Green Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Grintale.name: Plump Body
Grintale.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Neutral attacks while mounted.

Grizzbolt.name: Yellow Tank
Grizzbolt.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

Gumoss.name: Logging Assistance
Gumoss.desc: While in team, improves efficiency of cutting trees.

Hangyu.name: Flying Trapeze
Hangyu.desc: While in team, modified the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascent while gliding.

Hangyu Cryst.name: Winter Trapeze
Hangyu Cryst.desc: While in team, can be summoned and used instead of a glider. Enables slow ascent while gliding.

Hartalis.name: Sacred Barrier
Hartalis.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.

Helzephyr.name: Wings of Death
Helzephyr.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

Helzephyr Lux.name: Wings of Thunder
Helzephyr Lux.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

Herbil.name: Herbil Pulse
Herbil.desc: While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

Hoocrates.name: Dark Knowledge
Hoocrates.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Dark Pals.

Hoodle.name: Void-Dweller
Hoodle.desc: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by (50~100)% . (Does not stack)

Icelyn.name: Witch's Icy Veil
Icelyn.desc: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

Illuminant Bat.name: Bat Backup
Illuminant Bat.desc: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

Illuminant Slime.name: Slime Body
Illuminant Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Incineram.name: Flameclaw Hunter
Incineram.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

Incineram Noct.name: Darkclaw Hunter
Incineram Noct.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Hellfire Claw.

Jelliette.name: Jelliette Drop
Jelliette.desc: While in team, increases items obtained from fishing. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

Jellroy.name: Jellroy Drop
Jellroy.desc: While in team, increases items obtained from salvage. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed is increased.

Jetragon.name: Aerial Missile
Jetragon.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Jolthog.name: Jolt Bomb
Jolthog.desc: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an electrical explosion upon impact.

Jolthog Cryst.name: Cold Bomb
Jolthog Cryst.desc: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player's hand. When thrown at an enemy, causes an icy explosion upon impact.

Jormuntide.name: Stormbringer Sea Dragon
Jormuntide.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving over water.

Jormuntide Ignis.name: Stormbringer Lava Dragon
Jormuntide Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

Katress.name: Grimoire Collector
Katress.desc: When fighting together, Neutral Pals drop more items when defeated.

Katress Ignis.name: Botanical Atlas
Katress Ignis.desc: When fighting together, Grass Pals drop more items when defeated.

Kelpsea.name: Aqua Spout
Kelpsea.desc: While in team, increases the Attack of Water Pals. Sometimes drops Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

Kelpsea Ignis.name: Lava Spout
Kelpsea Ignis.desc: While in team, increases the Attack of Fire Pals. Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

Kikit.name: Rollin' Full Oil
Kikit.desc: While in team, Kikit helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of crude oil in the player's inventory.

Killamari.name: Fried Squid
Killamari.desc: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

Killamari Primo.name: Fried Killamari
Killamari Primo.desc: While in team, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

Kingpaca.name: King of Muscles
Kingpaca.desc: While in a team, Kingpaca helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Kingpaca Cryst.name: King of Muscles
Kingpaca Cryst.desc: While in a team, Kingpaca Cryst helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Kitsun.name: Clear Mind
Kitsun.desc: Can be ridden. Unaffected by the cold or heat while riding this Pal.

Kitsun Noct.name: Fogged Mind
Kitsun Noct.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the Player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

Knocklem.name: Steel Guardian Mode
Knocklem.desc: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack and Defense for a limited time.

Knocklem Ignis.name: Iron Guardian Mode
Knocklem Ignis.desc: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis 's Attack by (60~210)% and Defense by (60~210)% for a limited time.

Lamball.name: Fluffy Shield
Lamball.desc: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Lapiron.name: Friend of Earth
Lapiron.desc: While in party, increases the player's Defense by (50~65)% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

Lapure.name: Long-Sleeved Hurray
Lapure.desc: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by (10~50)% . (Does not stack)

Leafan.name: Selfless Discipline
Leafan.desc: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

Leezpunk.name: Sixth Sense
Leezpunk.desc: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

Leezpunk Ignis.name: Sixth Sense
Leezpunk Ignis.desc: When activated, utilizes its sixth sense to detect nearby dungeons.

Lifmunk.name: Lifmunk Recoil
Lifmunk.desc: When activated, leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follow up player attacks.

Loomen.name: Lantern Enchantment
Loomen.desc: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact , dealing additional damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

Loupmoon.name: Dark Gleam Strike
Loupmoon.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Jumping Claw.

Loupmoon Cryst.name: Frozen Gleam Strike
Loupmoon Cryst.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Snow Claw.

Lovander.name: Heart Drain
Lovander.desc: While fighting together, grants the player and Loveander the life steal effect which absorbs some of the received damage and restores Health.

Lullu.name: Floral Boost
Lullu.desc: While at a base, Lullu fills the farm with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops.

Lunaris.name: Antigravity
Lunaris.desc: While in team, Lunaris manipulates gravity, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Lyleen.name: Harvest Goddess
Lyleen.desc: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's Health.

Lyleen Noct.name: Goddess of the Tranquil Light
Lyleen Noct.desc: When activated, the queen's soothing graces greatly restore the player's Health.

Majex.name: Phantasmal Arcana
Majex.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn , the enemy creates flames around itself , dealing continuous damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage to enemies that come into contact with them. (Does not stack.)

Mammorest.name: Gaia Crusher
Mammorest.desc: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

Mammorest Cryst.name: Ice Crusher
Mammorest Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of cutting trees and mining ores while mounted.

Maraith.name: Messenger of Death
Maraith.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

Mau.name: Gold Digger
Mau.desc: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to a Ranch.

Mau Cryst.name: Gold Digger
Mau Cryst.desc: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to a Ranch.

Melpaca.name: Pecapaca Wool
Melpaca.desc: Can be Ridden. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

Menasting.name: Steel Scorpion
Menasting.desc: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

Menasting Terra.name: Steel Scorpion
Menasting Terra.desc: When fighting together, increases the player's defense and Electric Pals drop more items when defeated.

Mimog.name: Master of Unlocking
Mimog.desc: When near a treasure chest, Mimog can open the chest without using a key. The types of treasure chests that can be opened depend on the skill level

Moldron.name: Magma Overload
Moldron.desc: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

Moldron Cryst.name: Ice Overload
Moldron Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Ice damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)% . (Does not stack)

Mossanda.name: Grenadier Panda
Mossanda.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

Mossanda Lux.name: Grenadier Panda
Mossanda Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a grenade launcher while mounted.

Mozzarina.name: Milk Maker
Mozzarina.desc: Sometimes produces Milk when assigned to a Ranch.

Muffly.name: Fluffy Flutterer
Muffly.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Freeze . (Does not stack)

Munchill.name: Icy Maw
Munchill.desc: While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

Mycora.name: Charming Spore
Mycora.desc: While at a base, increases the Medicine Production Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Necromus.name: Dark Knight of the Abyss
Necromus.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

Needoll.name: Hug Me Please
Needoll.desc: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Ivy-Covered by (50~65)% . (Does not stack)

Needoll Noct.name: Hug You So Much
Needoll Noct.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Ivy-Covered (2~6) . (Does not stack)

Neptilius.name: Sentinal of the Great Sea
Neptilius.desc: While fighting together, it follows up your attacks with spear strikes. Can be ridden to travel quicky across water. While mounted, it can leap high into the air over water.

Nitemary.name: Soul Collector
Nitemary.desc: While fighting together, Pals drop more Pal Souls when defeated.

Nitemary Botan.name: Soul Binder
Nitemary Botan.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Grass Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Nitewing.name: Travel Companion
Nitewing.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

Nox.name: Kuudere
Nox.desc: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.

Nyafia.name: Shot-Nyan Mode
Nyafia.desc: When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Omascul.name: Masquerade Dance
Omascul.desc: While in team, the Pals in the team gain more experience points.

Ophydia.name: Glorious Mist
Ophydia.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak (2~6) . (Does not stack)

Orserk.name: Ferocious Thunder Dragon
Orserk.desc: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

Paladius.name: Holy Knight of the Firmament
Paladius.desc: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted.

Palumba.name: Samba Step
Palumba.desc: Can be ridden. Runs faster over grass.

Panthalus.name: Resonant Guardian
Panthalus.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.

Pengullet.name: Pengullet Launcher
Pengullet.desc: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

Pengullet Lux.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
Pengullet Lux.desc: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher and fires Pengullet Lux as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on contact and is incapacitated.

Penking.name: Brave Sailor
Penking.desc: While fighting together, Fire Pals drop more items when defeated.

Penking Lux.name: Unyielding Storm Commander
Penking Lux.desc: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.

Petallia.name: Blessing of the Flower Spirit
Petallia.desc: When activated, uses medicinal flowers to restore the player's Health.

Petallia Ignis.name: Passion of the Flower Spirit
Petallia Ignis.desc: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (80~90)% . While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered . (Does not stack)

Pierdon.name: Power Stone
Pierdon.desc: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by (50~65)% . (Does not stack)

Pierdon Cryst.name: Power Crystal
Pierdon Cryst.desc: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)

Polapup.name: Rider of the Snowy Mountain
Polapup.desc: Can be ridden. Runs faster over snow. Can slide quickly down slopes.

Polapup Terra.name: Snowy Mountain Slider
Polapup Terra.desc: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow . Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

Prixter.name: Scorpion Sonar
Prixter.desc: When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.

Prixter Lux.name: Scorpion Longwave
Prixter Lux.desc: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (30~50)% .

Prunelia.name: Prayer for Abundant Harvest
Prunelia.desc: While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest.

Puffolt.name: Crackle Booster
Puffolt.desc: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Pupperai.name: Best Boy
Pupperai.desc: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)% . (Does not stack)

Purple Slime.name: Slime Body
Purple Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Pyrin.name: Red Hare
Pyrin.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

Pyrin Noct.name: Black Hare
Pyrin Noct.desc: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

Quivern.name: Sky Dragon's Affection
Quivern.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Dragon attacks while mounted.

Quivern Botan.name: Grass Dragon's Affection
Quivern Botan.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Grass attacks while mounted.

Ragnahawk.name: Flame Wing
Ragnahawk.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Changes the player's attack type to Fire while mounted.

Rainbow Slime.name: Slime Body
Rainbow Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Rayhound.name: Jumping Force
Rayhound.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

Rayhound Cryst.name: Snow Shepherd
Rayhound Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Red Slime.name: Slime Body
Red Slime.desc: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

Reindrix.name: Cool Body
Reindrix.desc: Can be ridden. Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.

Relaxaurus.name: Hungry Missile
Relaxaurus.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Relaxaurus Lux.name: Missile Party
Relaxaurus Lux.desc: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

Renjishi.name: Stage Combat
Renjishi.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn (2~6) . (Does not stack)

Reptyro.name: Ore-loving Beast
Reptyro.desc: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of mining ores while mounted.

Reptyro Cryst.name: Ore-loving Beast
Reptyro Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. Improves efficiency of mining ores while mounted.

Ribbuny.name: Skilled Fingers
Ribbuny.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Neutral Pals. While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.

Ribbuny Botan.name: Grass Weaver
Ribbuny Botan.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Grass Pals. While at a base, increases work efficiency when working at Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, and other related facilities.

Robinquill.name: Hawk Eye
Robinquill.desc: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

Robinquill Terra.name: Hawk Eye
Robinquill Terra.desc: While fighting together, allows you to deal more damage to weak points.

Rooby.name: Tiny Spark
Rooby.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals.

Roujay.name: Dark-Nester
Roujay.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by (50~65)% . (Does not stack)

Rushoar.name: Hard Head
Rushoar.desc: Can be ridden. Increases efficiency of destroying boulders while mounted.

Sekhmet.name: Desert Empress
Sekhmet.desc: While at base, boosts Anubis 's work speed by (20~40)% . Increases efficiency by (30~60)% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

Selyne.name: Celestial Darkness
Selyne.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Neutral and Dark attacks while mounted.

Shadowbeak.name: Modified DNA
Shadowbeak.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, movement speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks while mounted.

Shaolong.name: Azure Sovereign
Shaolong.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

Shroomer.name: Swooshy Spores
Shroomer.desc: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

Shroomer Noct.name: Swooshy Spores
Shroomer Noct.desc: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.

Sibelyx.name: Silk Maker
Sibelyx.desc: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Blizzard Spike. Sometimes produces High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

Sibelyx Primo.name: Gilded Shroud
Sibelyx Primo.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch .

Silvance.name: Spore Stalwart
Silvance.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered , the enemy explodes , dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

Silvegis.name: Aegis Shield
Silvegis.desc: Can be ridden. Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.

Skutlass.name: Fish Fillet
Skutlass.desc: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2600~3900) ). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

Skutlass Ignis.name: Seared Fish Fillet
Skutlass Ignis.desc: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2900~4200) ). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

Slowatt.name: Chillswitch
Slowatt.desc: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify , the enemy discharges electricity , dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

Smokie.name: Dig, Dog, Dig!
Smokie.desc: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

Smokie Cryst.name: Cryo Instincts
Smokie Cryst.desc: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Snock.name: Charging Shell
Snock.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify (2~6) . (Does not stack)

Snock Lux.name: Grounding Shell
Snock Lux.desc: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak . (Does not stack)

Snugloo.name: Invisible Eye
Snugloo.desc: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

Solenne.name: Untainted Maiden
Solenne.desc: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

Solmora.name: Charming Fish
Solmora.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals . (Does not stack)

Solmora Lux.name: Shocking Fish
Solmora Lux.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)% . While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals . (Does not stack)

Sootseer.name: Grave Robber
Sootseer.desc: Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

Souffline.name: Fuzzy Fairy
Souffline.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered . (Does not stack)

Sparkit.name: Static Electricity
Sparkit.desc: While in team, increases Attack of Electric Pals.

Splatterina.name: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion
Splatterina.desc: While in possession, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases.

Starryon.name: Night Dancer
Starryon.desc: Can be ridden. Increases movement speed while mounted at night.

Starryon Primo.name: Light Dancer
Starryon Primo.desc: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo )

Surfent.name: Swift Swimmer
Surfent.desc: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.

Surfent Terra.name: Sand Swimmer
Surfent Terra.desc: Can be ridden. While in team, Surfent Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of ores in the player's inventory.

Suzaku.name: Wings of Flame
Suzaku.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

Suzaku Aqua.name: Wings of Water
Suzaku Aqua.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Enhances Water attacks while mounted.

Swee.name: Fluffy
Swee.desc: While in team, Sweepa's stats will be increased.

Sweepa.name: King of Fluff
Sweepa.desc: Can be ridden. When fighting together, stats will increase the more Swee are in your team.

Tanzee.name: Cheery Rifle
Tanzee.desc: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Tanzee Ignis.name: Chipper Chimp Gunfire
Tanzee Ignis.desc: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Tarantriss.name: Tarantriss' Web
Tarantriss.desc: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider silk to grapple and move at fast speed.

Teafant.name: Soothing Shower
Teafant.desc: When activated, spouts mysterious water that soothes wounds and restores the player's Health.

Tetroise.name: Masonry Archelon
Tetroise.desc: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 . (Does not stack)

Tetroise Primo.name: Stone-Chaser Archelon
Tetroise Primo.desc: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by (80~100)% . (Does not stack)

Tocotoco.name: Eggbomb Launcher
Tocotoco.desc: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

Tombat.name: Ultrasonic Sensor
Tombat.desc: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect the presence of nearby Pals.

Tropicaw.name: Flower Dance
Tropicaw.desc: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Turtacle.name: Spikey Carrier
Turtacle.desc: While in team, Turtacle helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.

Turtacle Terra.name: Shiny Hauler
Turtacle Terra.desc: While in team, Turtacle Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory. Also increases Attack of Ground Pals.

Univolt.name: Swift Deity
Univolt.desc: Changes the player's attack type to Electric while mounted.

Univolt Cryst.name: Frigid Deity
Univolt Cryst.desc: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)% .

Vaelet.name: Purification of Gaia
Vaelet.desc: While fighting together, Ground Pals drop more items when defeated.

Valentail.name: Big Stretch
Valentail.desc: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

Vanwyrm.name: Aerial Marauder
Vanwyrm.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

Vanwyrm Cryst.name: Aerial Marauder
Vanwyrm Cryst.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases damage player deals to enemy weak points while mounted.

Venusa.name: Snake's Sagacity
Venusa.desc: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6) . (Does not stack)

Verdash.name: Grassland Speedster
Verdash.desc: When fighting together, increases player's movement speed and Changes the player's attack type to Grass

Vixy.name: Dig Here!
Vixy.desc: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch

Warsect.name: Hard Armor
Warsect.desc: When fighting together, increases player's defense and reduces damage recieved from Fire.

Warsect Terra.name: Fortified Shell
Warsect Terra.desc: When fighting together, increases player's defense and reduces damage recieved from Fire.

Whalaska.name: Chilled Whale Cruiser
Whalaska.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, the fishing minigame starts with the capture gauge higher than usual. Additionally, the capture gauge fills faster when the bar is aligned.

Whalaska Ignis.name: Cozy Whale Cruiser
Whalaska Ignis.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, the fishing minigame starts with the capture gauge higher than usual. Additionally, the capture gauge fills faster when the bar is aligned.

Wispaw.name: Death-Cheating Feline
Wispaw.desc: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus . (Does not stack)

Wistella.name: Hidden Dark Energy
Wistella.desc: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)% . (Does not stack)

Wixen.name: Lord Fox
Wixen.desc: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Fire.

Wixen Noct.name: Black Fox Lord
Wixen Noct.desc: When fighting together, Changes the player's attack type to Dark.

Woolipop.name: Candy Pop
Woolipop.desc: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch.

Woolipop Terra.name: Bitter Pop
Woolipop Terra.desc: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch . While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)% . (Does not stack)

Wumpo.name: Guardian of the Snowy Mountain
Wumpo.desc: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Wumpo Botan.name: Guardian of the South
Wumpo Botan.desc: Can be ridden. While in team, Wumpo Botan helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

Xenogard.name: Crater Enthusiast
Xenogard.desc: Can be ridden. While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.

Xenolord.name: Meteor Wings
Xenolord.desc: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by (20~50)% . (Does not stack)

Xenovader.name: Meteor Mania
Xenovader.desc: While in the team, increases damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.

Yakumo.name: Birds of a Feather
Yakumo.desc: Can be ridden. While fighting together, it becomes easier to encounter pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)
